Name: Disclaimer - External Email Footer
Details: Appends HTML disclaimer to all outbound external messages

Name: Block Auto-Forward to External
Details: Rejects messages with auto-forward headers to external recipients

Name: Encrypt Sensitive Data
Details: Applies Office 365 Message Encryption when subject contains [Encrypt]

Name: Flag Large Attachments
Details: Generates incident report for attachments over 25 MB

Name: Inbound from Barracuda Gateway
Details: Partner connector; TLS enforced; IP restricted to 198.51.100.0/24
